acceptance_criteria.text: Worker dispatches a one-time Telegram follow-up after a completed paid map refresh.
proof: src/worker.py calls dispatch_operator_refresh_telegram_followup after parsequeue is marked completed and committed.

acceptance_criteria.text: Follow-up includes refresh result, new/unanswered review counts, billing summary, and manual next step.
proof: format_refresh_followup_text includes result status, counts, billing label, snippets, and next manual command.
tests assert refresh summary, billing copy, and manual publication boundary text.

acceptance_criteria.text: Idempotency is stored on matching reservation metadata to avoid spam.
proof: Reservation metadata stores telegram_refresh_followup_attempted_at, telegram_refresh_followup_delivered_at, and telegram_refresh_followup_status.
Duplicate metadata returns telegram_refresh_followup_already_attempted and does not call send_func.
Worker passes commit_func=conn.commit so attempted metadata is committed before network send.
gaps: Failed sends are intentionally not retried automatically to avoid notification spam.

acceptance_criteria.text: Boundary is explicit: no map-provider writes, no customer messages, no credit/pricing changes.
proof: Follow-up service only uses the injected owner-bot send_func and reservation metadata updates.
scripts/lint_backend_baseline.sh includes guardrails for no provider-write markers and manual-publication copy.
Docs document Sprint 41 as a one-time owner notification only.

acceptance_criteria.text: Missing owner Telegram id, missing reservation, or still-processing refresh returns structured skipped results.
proof: dispatch_operator_refresh_telegram_followup returns structured skipped reasons for missing identity, missing reservation, missing Telegram id, duplicate attempt, and processing status.
Unit tests cover missing owner Telegram id and duplicate attempt.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: PYTHONPATH=src:. python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_operator_refresh_telegram_followup.py tests/test_operator_refresh_result.py tests/test_worker_apify_settlement.py tests/test_telegram_dashboard_copy.py tests/test_operator_map_refresh.py
known_gaps: No live Telegram message was sent during verification; tests use an injected fake sender to avoid real owner notifications.
